gravesown.configuration.title: Gravesown Configuration
gravesown.configuration.world.tooltip: Controls how Gravesown replaces the vanilla ecosystem.
gravesown.configuration.removeExistingVa: Prevents ordinary vanilla mobs loaded from saved chunks from re-entering the world.
gravesown.configuration.replaceNaturalVa: Replaces eligible Overworld animal spawns and suppresses other ordinary natural vanilla spawns.
gravesown.configuration.preserveVanillaB: Keeps the Ender Dragon and Wither until progression-safe Gravesown replacements exist.
item.gravesown.quietskin.dead_scent: Dead Scent: -12.5% blood-scent range per piece
screen.gravesown.survivor_codex.title: Survivor's Codex
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.awake:
AWAKENING

The old world is gone. This codex records only tools already proven. Keep it: right-click to reopen it.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.first:
FIRST MATERIALS

Break 1 Ribroot Stem. Craft it into 4 Planks, then place 2 Planks vertically for 4 Splints.

Gather 3 Threadgrass for 2 Bindings.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.handp:
CRUDE HANDPICK

In your 2x2 grid:
SS
 B

S = Splint
B = Binding

It mines Hushstone, not Deep Hushstone.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.hushs:
HUSHSTONE

Use the Handpick to mine ordinary Hushstone. One block splits into 4 Shards. Four Shards rebuild the block.

The Handpick cannot harvest Deep Hushstone.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.knife:
BOUND KNIFE

In your 2x2 grid:
H 
SB

H = Hushstone Shard
S = Splint
B = Binding

The knife cuts Threadgrass quickly.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.graze:
HOLLOW GRAZER

Healthy prey is safer by day. Blood and night provoke a hunt. Grazers yield Hide, Sinew, Tallow, tainted Meat and rarely a Hollow Jaw.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.quiet:
QUIETSKIN

Craft Hood, Coat, Legwraps and Boots from Grazer Hide and Sinew. Each worn piece reduces daytime blood-scent range by 12.5%.

It does not hide you at night.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.biome:
FOUR WOUNDS

Ash marks the Sown Grave. Purple roots thicken in Ribroot Groves. Red stone opens into Marrow Rifts. Black-green silt announces Suture Mire.

Each region carries its own life and danger.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.ribsp:
RIBSPRING

Small herds flee through the Groves. Do not chase them into darkness without food. Their sinew and tainted meat can keep the first tools and hunger alive.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.stitc:
STITCHTUSK

The Rifts belong to heavy territorial beasts. A roar and rigid stance warn of a straight charge. Step aside; never try to outrun it head-on.
item.gravesown.survivor_codex.page.wound:
WOUNDSCENT

The Mire hunter smells blood. When healthy, keep twelve blocks away. Below three quarters health, it can follow you from much farther. Its pursuit pauses briefly: use that breath to escape.
quest.gravesown.root.title: After the Silence
quest.gravesown.root.description: Open the Survivor Codex and take stock of the changed world.
quest.gravesown.gather.title: Root and Thread
quest.gravesown.gather.description: Carry a Ribroot Stem and Threadgrass at the same time.
quest.gravesown.handpick.title: A Grip on Stone
quest.gravesown.handpick.description: Craft a Crude Handpick in your 2x2 grid.
quest.gravesown.shard.title: Break the Silence
quest.gravesown.knife.title: Bound Edge
quest.gravesown.grazer.title: The Herd Bleeds
quest.gravesown.grazer.description: Kill a Hollow Grazer. The server remembers the hunt.
quest.gravesown.quietskin.title: Dead Scent
quest.gravesown.quietskin.description: Wear the complete Quietskin set at once.
quest.gravesown.gravework.title: A Real Work Surface
quest.gravesown.gravework.description: Carry a Gravework Bench and unlock the 4x4 craft grid.
quest.gravesown.three_woods.title: Three Living Timbers
quest.gravesown.three_woods.description: Carry Ribroot, Emberbark and Palevine planks together.
quest.gravesown.kitchen.title: Fire and Broth
quest.gravesown.kitchen.description: Build a Field Kitchen for multi-stage meals.
quest.gravesown.utensils.title: Tools of the Pot
quest.gravesown.utensils.description: Craft both a Bone Cleaver and a Stirring Hook.
quest.gravesown.meal.title: Something Warm
quest.gravesown.meal.description: Prepare any complete meal at the Field Kitchen.
quest.gravesown.angler.title: Beneath the Gloam
quest.gravesown.angler.description: Catch a Needle Sprat with the Gloamline Rod.
quest.gravesown.ruin.title: What the Ruins Kept
quest.gravesown.ruin.description: Recover a Reliquary Crate from a ruined shelter.
The old recipes are gone. Survival begins with root, thread and the tools recorded here.
Break a Ribroot Stem and gather Threadgrass from the surface.
Turn the stem into planks and splints; bind Threadgrass into Thread Binding.
Make a Crude Handpick in your personal 2x2 grid and mine Hushstone.
Build the 4x4 Gravework Bench. Open CRAFTS for exact patterns and CHAIN for dependencies.
Hover any supported item and press R to jump directly to its creation chain.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.farming: Crops grow only on tilled Gravesown soil. Vanilla water cannot keep this ground alive.
Use a Hushstone Hoe on Ashen Sod or Grave Loam with empty space above it.
Place Gloamwater within four blocks. Moist furrows show that the soil is hydrated.
Process Threadgrass into Ashgrain Seeds and Pallid Bulbs into Mirebean Seeds.
Plant, wait for the tallest growth stage, then harvest. Mature crops return produce and seeds.
Gravebloom Dust accelerates young plants and can also spread surface growth.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.food.in: Raw carrion is dangerous. Farming and the Pitch Kiln turn uncertain finds into dependable meals.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.food.st: Cook Rotfin Flesh in the Pitch Kiln for Smoked Rotfin.
Combine three Ashgrain into a filling Ashgrain Loaf in the personal grid.
Mirebeans can be eaten in an emergency, but save some for planting.
Combine a loaf, a Mirebean and Smoked Rotfin for a long-lasting Field Ration.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.food.ti: Use the FOOD category in CRAFTS to compare every known meal.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.water.i: Gloamwater is the living fluid of the new world. It flows like water, carries fish and sustains crops.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.water.s: Small Mire ponds and the Gloam Sea are the reliable natural sources.
A bucket can move a source block without converting it into vanilla water.
Threadkelp, Veilweed, Drowned Roots, Bladderpods and Lumen Kelp mark healthy beds.
Use the Gloamline Rod for fish and the Gloam Skiff for long crossings.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.water.t: Lumen Kelp emits a mild glow; it is a natural underwater landmark, not a torch.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.buildin: Every local timber can be worked into a complete shelter family at the Gravework Bench.
Turn stems into planks, then use the Sawmill when you need clean, vanilla-like cut boards.
Stairs and slabs shape roofs and foundations without foreign blocks.
Fences, gates, doors and trapdoors secure paths and animal pens.
A Tallow Lantern is the first steady crafted light source.
Select BUILDING in CRAFTS to keep construction recipes separate from tools and food.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.cooking: The Field Kitchen combines three ingredients while its cleaver and hook survive as reusable utensils.
Craft the kitchen at the 4x4 Gravework Bench from local planks, splints and Hushstone.
Make a Bone Cleaver and Stirring Hook. Put them in the two utensil slots.
Fill the three upper slots in the exact order shown in CRAFTS. A Gloamwater Bucket returns an empty bucket.
Mirebean Stew, Charred Marrow Pot and Gloam Chowder each turn different regions into dependable food.
Utensils wear slowly. Prepare replacements before their final use.
screen.gravesown.codex_hub.guide.explora: Nine broad biomes form one living native ecosystem. Distinct forests, rifts, mire and open water reward long journeys.
Mosswake Woods and Amberquiet Grove share readable Ashen Sod, but their trees, plants and timber palettes remain distinct.
Every timber family includes planks, cut planks, stairs, slabs, fences, gates, doors and trapdoors in its own colour.
Ruined shelters are rare, partially collapsed and built from the timber native to their variant.
Their Reliquary Crates hold four storage rows and draw only from Gravesown survival loot.
Carry every timber colour once to record the expanded timber survey in STORY.
